verification_questions.question: Does docs/two-party-permutation-matrix.md have a new '## Property-test coverage' section with the TP-XX table?
verification_questions.expected: Section present with 10 scenario family rows mapping to invariant IDs
verification_questions.actual: Section appended after existing content, before '## Updating this document'. Contains TP-01..04 through TP-90..91 rows with invariant IDs sourced from spec.md §Documentation.

verification_questions.question: Does e2e/tests/property-tests.md exist and cover the three-layer model?
verification_questions.expected: File exists; sections covering all three layers with rationale
verification_questions.actual: File created. 'Why three layers' section explains reducer (milliseconds/1000 runs), multi-client (seconds/500 runs), full stack (minutes/20 runs) with wall-clock and scope distinctions.

verification_questions.question: Does property-tests.md reference the invariant catalogue and provide a grep hint?
verification_questions.expected: Link to specs/epic-property-based-invariants/spec.md; grep command showing how to find invariant IDs across test files
verification_questions.actual: Section 'Invariant catalogue cross-reference' links to spec.md and provides grep -r example. Layer coverage table maps each file to its invariant IDs.

verification_questions.question: Does property-tests.md explain how to read fast-check counterexample output?
verification_questions.expected: Explanation of seed, path, Counterexample, and Shrunk N time(s) fields
verification_questions.actual: Section 'How to read fast-check counterexample output' covers all four fields with example output and explanation of Actor.Verb(args) DSL form.

verification_questions.question: Does property-tests.md show how to reproduce via FAST_CHECK_SEED and FAST_CHECK_PATH?
verification_questions.expected: Shell commands using both env vars for both layer 3 (playwright) and layers 1-2 (vitest)
verification_questions.actual: Section 'How to reproduce a counterexample' shows bash commands for both Playwright and vitest, and explains how the env vars map to fast-check's seed/path options. Policy on not committing seeds also documented.

verification_questions.question: Does property-tests.md distinguish asserted (S/A/C) from labelled-only (D) properties and explain why D1/D2/D3 are labelled?
verification_questions.expected: Clear distinction; individual explanation for each of D1, D2, D3
verification_questions.actual: Section 'Asserted vs. labelled-only properties' defines both categories, then explains D1 (equal-timestamp LWW), D2 (publish-failure optimistic), and D3 (late snapshot) individually with their root causes and why fixing them is deferred.

verification_questions.question: Do unit tests still pass unchanged after S7?
verification_questions.actual: 79/79 pass. S7 is documentation-only — no source files touched.
